# Skill: Automated Testing and System Validation

Purpose
Ensure that implemented functionality works correctly through automated testing and validation.

Testing Strategy

Backend Testing
Use tools such as Jest, Supertest, or Pytest.

Frontend Testing
Use tools such as Vitest or component testing frameworks.

Testing Process

1. Write unit tests for core business logic.

2. Write API tests for REST endpoints.

3. Validate request and response structures.

4. Test authentication flows.

5. Test error conditions and edge cases.

6. Validate database interactions.

7. Perform manual end-to-end verification of key workflows.

Deliverables

• Unit tests for critical logic  
• API endpoint validation  
• Verified application workflows
